description: Baseline: 12 failures (4 failed + 8 errors). 4090 passed. Categories: 9 include+interrupt, 1 render syntax, 2 dynamic include
Fix render_static_name_only: let SyntaxError propagate from compile block so liquid-spec runner detects it as parse_error. +1 passed (4091)
Fix dynamic include for/with iteration: add __for__ support + array iteration for with clause in generate_dynamic_partial. +2 passed (4093)

100% spec coverage! Fix include+interrupt propagation (check scope.has_interrupt? after partial calls, throw to caller's loop), guard WRITE_VAR/WRITE_VAR_PATH with interrupt check. 12→0 failures, 4102 passed, complexity 1000/1000
Skip IL passes 1,2,3,5 for structured compiler. Parse 0.9% faster but breaks 362 tests in main suite - passes needed for general templates.
Fast-path fold_const_ops: skip non-constant opcodes with hash lookup instead of const_value() method call. No regression in main suite (same 6 pre-existing failures).
Use RubyVM::InstructionSequence.compile instead of eval for generated code. 17% faster eval for large templates. Parse 5349→5310µs. No regression in main suite.
Second run to confirm ISeq improvement. render 84895 (noise), parse 5294 (0.8% better than original baseline).

Shorten generated code variable names (__output__→_O, __scope__→_S, __current_file__→_F). 8.8% smaller generated code, 1.3% faster parse (5310→5241µs). Render 84322 (best yet, likely noise). No regression in main suite.
Shorten more generated variable names (for-loop vars, temps). 14.9% total code reduction vs original. Parse 5241→5232µs. No regression.
Pre-compute pass flags as local booleans in fused_peephole to avoid Set#include? per instruction. Parse 5230→5121µs (2.1% improvement). No regression.
Confirmation run for cumulative optimizations. Parse 5115µs (4.2% below baseline), render 84665µs (0.4% below baseline).
Short method aliases for generated code (_H.lf, _H.oa, _H.cf, _H.lp). 21.2% total code size reduction from baseline. Parse 5130µs (3.9% below baseline). No regression.
Add short aliases for compare, contains, to_iterable, slice_collection, valid_integer, bracket_lookup. Marginal further code size reduction. Parse 5127µs. No regression.
Confirmation run. parse 5129, render 85000. No new changes.
Replace Expr keyword Struct with simple class (5x faster allocation). Parse 5101→4893µs (4.1% improvement). Total parse improvement from baseline: 8.3%! No regression.
Final confirmation run. Parse 4911µs (8.0% improvement from baseline 5338). Render 85337 (noise). Stable improvement in parse, render dominated by deep_copy.
Skip compilation_blockers scan (always returns empty). Eliminates O(n) instruction scan per compile. Parse 4894µs. Render 83728 (best ever, likely noise). No regression.
Confirmation run. parse 4897, render 85219. Stable at ~8.3% parse improvement.
Cache indent strings (INDENT[n] instead of '  ' * n). Avoids repeated string allocation during codegen. Parse 4907µs, render 84162µs. No regression.
Pausing optimization loop to write benchmark improvement suggestions per user request.
New baseline after liquid-spec fix (shallow dup instead of deep_copy). Render 464µs (was 85025µs), parse 4964µs, 3432 render allocs (was 94108). Now measuring actual template execution!
Confirmation of baseline. render 464µs, parse 5006µs. Consistent.
Avoid *args splat in Filters.apply (case on args.length). Render 464→447µs (3.7% improvement). Now visible with fixed benchmark!
Reorder output_append case branches. No improvement (451 vs 447).
Skip @assigned_vars tracking in Scope#assign when no counters active. Saves 6 allocs (3432→3426). Correct: assigned_vars only read when @has_counters is true.
Extract paginate setup to _H.build_paginate helper. Parse 4967→4766µs (4.0% improvement from smaller generated code). Render 448→445µs. Reverted assign_vars optimization (broke 2 tests).
Confirmation run. render 446µs, parse 4770µs. Stable.
Use EMPTY_HASH for registers when context has no registers. Saves 23 allocs (3448→3425). Render 446µs stable.
Confirmation. render 445, parse 4754. Total: render -4.1%, parse -10.9% from original baseline. Looking for bigger render wins.
Skip name.is_a?(String) check in Filters.apply — generated code always passes string literals. Render 442µs (marginal). Simpler code.
First-key-only string check heuristic for Scope.new. Not safe — symbol keys would be missed. Allocs went UP (3541 vs 3425).
Inline date, strip_html, truncatewords filters at compile time. Bypasses Filters.apply overhead. Render 442→435µs, allocs 3425→3418. Total: render -6.3%, parse -11.0% from baseline.

Inline many safe filters (money, asset_url, handle, img_url, etc.) via direct Filters.send — bypasses apply() dispatch. Render 435→421µs (9.3% total). Parse 4748→4706. Allocs 3418→3376. No regression in main suite.
Confirmation. render 428, parse 4698. Looking for next optimization.
Confirmation. render 423, parse 4715.
Fast ISO date parsing in date filter. Avoids Time.parse for YYYY-MM-DD format (50% faster). Render 399→386µs (16.8% total from baseline!). Allocs 3289→3236. No regression.
Confirmation. render 385, parse 4648. Stable at ~17% render improvement from baseline.
Use inline_lookup (lf/lp) for WRITE_VAR_PATH instead of generic _H.lookup. Skips special-key check for non-special keys. Render 385µs (stable). No regression.
